review: The worst fast food app I've ever used. The way you have to fight it to simply get it to let you scan your barcode at a restaurant should be a case study in how not to make an app.
Loudmouth drunks from the bar took over the establishment

McDonald's somehow found a way to make their app even worse. Can't check in early anymore to get my order going, making the whole process EVEN SLOWER, as though that were even possible. Desperately waiting for A&W to hit my town so I can abandon this awful brand.
